segments.text: A Psalm of David, when he changed his behavior before Abimelech, who drove him away, and he departed.
I will bless the LORD at all times: his praise shall continually be in my mouth.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: My soul shall make her boast in the LORD: the humble shall hear thereof, and be glad.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: O magnify the LORD with me, and let us exalt his name together.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: I sought the LORD, and he heard me, and delivered me from all my fears.
segments.speaker: David

footnotes: were lightened: or, they flowed unto him

segments.text: They looked unto him, and were lightened: and their faces were not ashamed.
This poor man cried, and the LORD heard him, and saved him out of all his troubles.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: The angel of the LORD encampeth round about them that fear him, and delivereth them.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: O taste and see that the LORD is good: blessed is the man that trusteth in him.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: O fear the LORD, ye his saints: for there is no want to them that fear him.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: The young lions do lack, and suffer hunger: but they that seek the LORD shall not want any good thing.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: Come, ye children, hearken unto me: I will teach you the fear of the LORD.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: What man is he that desireth life, and loveth many days, that he may see good?
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: Keep thy tongue from evil, and thy lips from speaking guile.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: Depart from evil, and do good; seek peace, and pursue it.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: The eyes of the LORD are upon the righteous, and his ears are open unto their cry.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: The face of the LORD is against them that do evil, to cut off the remembrance of them from the earth.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: The righteous cry, and the LORD heareth, and delivereth them out of all their troubles.
segments.speaker: God

footnotes: unto…: Heb. to the broken of heart
of a contrite…: Heb. contrite of spirit

segments.text: Many are the afflictions of the righteous: but the LORD delivereth him out of them all.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: He keepeth all his bones: not one of them is broken.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Evil shall slay the wicked: and they that hate the righteous shall be desolate.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: The LORD redeemeth the soul of his servants: and none of them that trust in him shall be desolate.
segments.speaker: God
